title: mirabilis texensis
intro: Mirabilis texensis, commonly known as the Texas four o'clock, is a flowering plant species native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mirabilis texensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
